narrative:
North Canton 3-C (precinct in Stark County) has 980 registered voters, with 48.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.8 percentage points.
